description: AC-3: the reconciliation report shows every artifact pre/post owner and flags indeterminates; the redirect model keeps merged-away ids resolvable; identity caches invalidate across the merge.

cases.name: AC-3: the reconciliation report shows pre/post owners and flags indeterminates for manual adjudication
while merged the merged-away id resolves to the survivor — nothing 404s
recovery invariant: identity caches written before the merge are refused after it
